name: Peabody Energy Corporation
description: Peabody Energy Corporation is the leading global pure-play coal producer, serving power-generation and steelmaking customers in more than 25 countries on six continents. The company's operations are organized into several segments, including Seaborne Thermal Mining, Seaborne Metallurgical Mining, Powder River Basin Mining, and Other U.S. Thermal Mining. Peabody is committed to providing essential energy and steelmaking ingredients while focusing on safety, sustainability, and financial strength.
